creator: hirner@bitfire.at
text:
There are still issues with FreeBSD 10, see ports/186184 and
ports/187531. I will install FreeBSD 10 on a virtual machine and try to
find a solution as soon as I find time.

TeamSpeak say that the next minor release will contain "FreeBSD 10
support" so I guess they'll link it against the new C++ lib. Maybe we
should just wait for the next minor release before doing unnecessary
porting work ;)

Best regards,
R Hirner
